drive_type: Depends upon the strength of students.
stream_required: B.E / B.Tech (Graphic & Gaming) B.Design B.Sc (Graphic & Web Designing) B.Sc / M.Sc (Animation, VFX Gaming) Any UG / PG Designing courses.
date_of_joining: January 2026 (leaves will be provided for examination)

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 6 month Internship : Rs 21,000 per month Salary after 6 months Internship : CTC 13.8 LPA (5.48 Fixed + 1.65 Employee Benefits + 91k Performance Bonus + 5.5 ESOP + others)
package_salary.bond: We provide the students with direct offer after final selection and the students will have bond that has to be signed. Once they have signed the bond the internship period will start.(24 months bond after internship period - during the internship the bond will be applicable)

selection_process_steps: • Based on the students data provided by
the college. We will shortlist the profiles who can attend for the drive.
• Shortlisted students will have a Hackathon through which we will shortlist
• There will be 3 rounds of interview
